creator: sf@FreeBSD.org
text:
pkg-descr is not good place to put license description due to (a) not
so many ports do this (b) pkg-descr exceeds 24 lines(see portlint).

I'd suggest to prepare a separate file under files/ and install it to
${PREFIX}/share/doc/ja/marumoji-fonts. "README" or "LICENSE" is good
for its name, I think.

-- 
FUJISHIMA Satsuki
